name: Mushroom Turnovers
recipeIngredient: Mushrooms (for filling): 4 ounces, stems and pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine butter, cream cheese, and salt. Beat well until smooth.
2. Gradually add flour, mixing continuously until the dough is combined.
3. Wrap the dough in waxed paper and refrigerate for at least 8 hours or overnight.
4. Remove the dough from the refrigerator about 10 minutes before rolling out.
5. Roll out part of the dough at a time to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
6. Cut into 2 1/2-inch rounds.
7. Place a teaspoon of mushroom filling in each round.
8. Moisten the edges and fold the turnover in half.
9. Press the edges with a fork to seal.
10. In a separate bowl, mix egg and milk until slightly beaten.
11. Brush the turnovers with the egg mixture and refrigerate for 1 hour before baking.
12. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes or until golden brown. The turnover can also be frozen.
Note: Makes 5 dozen
